title: Run Internal – Loop & Steps
description: Inner run loop, run step coordination, agent bindings, and turn preparation/resolution

classes.name: AgentBindings
classes.notes: Carries dual agent identities for a turn. public_agent = visible/reported agent; execution_agent = may be a sandbox-rewritten clone.

classes.name: QueueCompleteSentinel
classes.notes: Sentinel signals end of streaming queue. Singleton QUEUE_COMPLETE_SENTINEL.

run_loop.py: start_streaming(starting_input, streamed_result, starting_agent, max_turns, hooks, context_wrapper, run_config, error_handlers, previous_response_id, auto_previous_response_id, conversation_id, session, run_state, *, is_resumed_state, sandbox_runtime) -> None [async]

run_single_turn(*, bindings, all_tools, original_input, generated_items, hooks, context_wrapper, run_config, should_run_agent_start_hooks, tool_use_tracker, server_conversation_tracker, session, session_items_to_rewind, reasoning_item_id_policy, prompt_cache_key_resolver) -> SingleStepResult [async]
get_new_response(bindings, system_prompt, input, output_schema, all_tools, handoffs, hooks, context_wrapper, run_config, tool_use_tracker, server_conversation_tracker, ...) -> ModelResponse [async]
turn_preparation.py: maybe_filter_model_input(*, agent, run_config, context_wrapper, input_items, system_instructions) -> ModelInputData [async]
turn_resolution.py: process_model_response(*, agent, all_tools, response, output_schema, handoffs, existing_items) -> ProcessedResponse

get_single_step_result_from_response(*, bindings, all_tools, original_input, pre_step_items, new_response, output_schema, handoffs, hooks, context_wrapper, run_config, tool_use_tracker, server_manages_conversation, event_queue, before_side_effects) -> SingleStepResult [async]

execute_tools_and_side_effects(*, bindings, original_input, pre_step_items, new_response, processed_response, output_schema, hooks, context_wrapper, run_config, server_manages_conversation) -> SingleStepResult [async]

execute_handoffs(*, public_agent, original_input, pre_step_items, new_step_items, new_response, run_handoffs, hooks, context_wrapper, run_config, server_manages_conversation, nest_handoff_history_fn) -> SingleStepResult [async]

execute_final_output(*, public_agent, original_input, new_response, pre_step_items, new_step_items, final_output, hooks, context_wrapper, tool_input_guardrail_results, tool_output_guardrail_results) -> SingleStepResult [async]

key_relationships: SingleStepResult composes ModelResponse, ProcessedResponse, list[RunItem], NextStep union

ProcessedResponse composes ToolRunHandoff[], ToolRunFunction[], ToolRunComputerAction[], ToolRunCustom[], ToolRunLocalShellCall[], ToolRunShellCall[], ToolRunApplyPatchCall[], ToolRunMCPApprovalRequest[]
run_single_turn uses AgentBindings, calls get_output_schema / get_handoffs / get_new_response / get_single_step_result_from_response
execute_tools_and_side_effects may delegate to execute_handoffs or execute_final_output or return NextStepInterruption/NextStepRunAgain
start_streaming orchestrates run_single_turn_streamed in a loop up to max_turns
NextStepHandoff/NextStepFinalOutput/NextStepRunAgain/NextStepInterruption are discriminated-union variants stored in SingleStepResult.next_step
turn_lifecycle: 1. run_single_turn: fire on_agent_start hooks, build system_prompt + prompt_config
5. execute_tools_and_side_effects: run tools, collect guardrail results, detect interruptions
6b. handoffs found? → execute_handoffs → NextStepHandoff (new agent next iteration)
6c. tool final output? → check_for_final_output_from_tools → execute_final_output → NextStepFinalOutput
6d. model text final output? → run output guardrails → NextStepFinalOutput
7. Loop terminates on NextStepFinalOutput or MaxTurnsExceeded
important_notes: All internal symbols; none are part of the public SDK.
AgentBindings separates the 'public' identity (hooks/events) from the 'execution' identity (sandbox rewrites).
ProcessedResponse is the central parsed view of a single model response, routing every output item to the correct ToolRun* bucket.
SingleStepResult is the canonical output of one loop iteration, carrying all generated items and the next-step discriminator.
tool_use_behavior on Agent controls when tool output short-circuits to final output: 'run_llm_again' | 'stop_on_first_tool' | {stop_at_tool_names} | callable.
Interruptions (human-in-the-loop approval) pause the loop via NextStepInterruption; resolved via resolve_interrupted_turn.
Server-managed conversations (OpenAI Responses API conversation_id) disable handoff input filters and nest_handoff_history.
